The Lost City (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $105,344,029Details
International Box Office $86,244,160
Worldwide Box Office $191,588,189
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $5,903,665
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,979,327
Total $8,882,992
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Brilliant, but reclusive author Loretta Sage has spent her career writing about exotic places in her popular romance-adventure novels featuring handsome cover model Alan, who has dedicated his life to embodying the hero character, “Dash.” While on tour promoting her new book with Alan, Loretta is kidnapped by an eccentric billionaire who hopes that she can lead him to the ancient lost city’s treasure from her latest story. Wanting to prove that he can be a hero in real life and not just on the pages of her books, Alan sets off to rescue her. Thrust into an epic jungle adventure, the unlikely pair will need to work together to survive the elements and find the ancient treasure before it’s lost forever.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$30,453,269 (28.9% of total gross)
Legs:3.46 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:55.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$74,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,253 opening theaters/4,283 max. theaters, 6.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $119,650,005

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 25th, 2022 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: March 24th, 2022 (Wide) (Australia)
March 25th, 2022 (Wide) (Romania)
March 25th, 2022 (Wide), released as Ztracené město (Czech Republic)
March 25th, 2022 (Wide), released as Stratené mesto (Slovakia)
March 25th, 2022 (Wide), released as Kayıp Şehir (Turkey)
Video Release: May 10th, 2022 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence and some bloody images, suggestive material, partial nudity and language.
(Rating bulletin 2722 (cert #53462), 3/9/2022)
Running Time: 112 minutes
Plot point: Treasure Hunters, Writing and Writers
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Full financial estimates for this film, including domestic and international box office, video sales, video rentals, TV and ancillary revenue are available through our research services. For more information, please contact us at research@the-numbers.com.


  • Summary
  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

Brilliant, but reclusive author Loretta Sage has spent her career writing about exotic places in her popular romance-adventure novels featuring handsome cover model Alan, who has dedicated his life to embodying the hero character, “Dash.” While on tour promoting her new book with Alan, Loretta is kidnapped by an eccentric billionaire who hopes that she can lead him to the ancient lost city’s treasure from her latest story. Wanting to prove that he can be a hero in real life and not just on the pages of her books, Alan sets off to rescue her. Thrust into an epic jungle adventure, the unlikely pair will need to work together to survive the elements and find the ancient treasure before it’s lost forever.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$30,453,269 (28.9% of total gross)
Legs:3.46 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:55.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$74,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,253 opening theaters/4,283 max. theaters, 6.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $119,650,005
